rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing unresolved references or removing invalid clauses
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
generic_rules: Preserve existing architecture when repairing validator diagnostics
Remove invalid clauses instead of adding architecture when references are unresolved
Use only visible identifiers in the current scope
Align helper declaration types with expression types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
Comparison expressions are bool; integer literals and integer arithmetic are int; real literals and real arithmetic are real
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
Do not use subcomponent ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are the normal location for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
Component implementation annexes are used for implementation-level bindings such as assignments when they are valid in that scope
